low.prompt_text: Choose the correct verb: 'The sample ___ contaminated.' (is/are)

mid.prompt_text: Correct the sentence: 'Each of the samples have been tested twice'.
correct_answers: each of the samples has been tested twice

high.prompt_text: Correct the sentence: 'The data suggests that neither compound are stable under heat'.
correct_answers: the data suggest that neither compound is stable under heat
